name: dslforge
description: Multi-framework DSL workflow assistant for Visual Studio Code with Langium, ANTLR4, and Xtext support.

untrustedWorkspaces.description: DSLForge can inspect supported DSL workspaces in Restricted Mode, but validation and AI-backed commands require workspace trust.

dslforge.validation.command.markdownDescription: Workspace validation command used first by `DSLForge: Validate Current Grammar`. If empty, DSLForge auto-detects a supported `package.json` script, `gradlew` task, or `mvnw` goal.

dslforge.validation.maxCapturedOutputCha.markdownDescription: Maximum number of output characters DSLForge keeps in memory while validation is running. Additional output is still streamed to the Output panel but is not retained for diagnostics parsing.

dslforge.ai.maxContextFiles.markdownDescription: Maximum number of selected context files DSLForge sends to AI-backed commands such as `Explain Current Grammar`, `Create DSL Scaffold`, and `Generate Sample DSL`.

dslforge.ai.maxCharactersPerFile.markdownDescription: Maximum number of characters DSLForge includes from any single context file for AI-backed commands.

dslforge.ai.maxContextCharacters.markdownDescription: Maximum total number of context characters DSLForge sends to AI-backed commands across all selected files.

dslforge.telemetry.enabled.markdownDescription: Enable DSLForge telemetry sinks when VS Code telemetry is enabled. If VS Code telemetry is disabled, DSLForge will not send telemetry regardless of this setting.

dslforge.telemetry.endpointOverride.markdownDescription: Optional override for the DSLForge telemetry proxy endpoint. Intended for local validation and staging environments.

explorer/context.when: resourceScheme == file && resourceExtname == .langium || resourceScheme == file && resourceExtname == .g4 || resourceScheme == file && resourceExtname == .xtext
resourceScheme == file && resourceExtname == .langium || resourceScheme == file && resourceExtname == .g4 || resourceScheme == file && resourceExtname == .xtext

resourceScheme == file && resourceExtname == .langium || resourceScheme == file && resourceExtname == .g4 || resourceScheme == file && resourceExtname == .xtext

resourceScheme == file && resourceExtname == .langium || resourceScheme == file && resourceExtname == .g4 || resourceScheme == file && resourceExtname == .xtext

resourceScheme == file && resourceExtname == .langium || resourceScheme == file && resourceExtname == .g4 || resourceScheme == file && resourceExtname == .xtext

scripts.ci:check: npm run format:check && npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.test: npm run build && node dist/test/aiPreviewApplyFixtureRunner.js && node dist/test/diagnosticsFixtureRunner.js && node dist/test/projectFixtureRunner.js && node dist/test/scaffoldFixtureRunner.js && node dist/test/manifestFixtureRunner.js
